A train travels at a original speed for a distance of 63 km and then travels a distance of 72 km at an average speed of 6 km/hr more than its original speed. If it takes 3 hours to complete the total journey, what is the original speed of the train in km/hr?

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Q8 Not checked
General Aptitude • INSTRUMENTATION ENGINEERING • Beginner • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of phrases given below should replace the phrase printed in bold type to make it grammatically correct?
Despite of their differences on matters of the principles, they all agree on the demand of hike in salary.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
“Despite their” in place of “Despite of their”. The preposition "of" is unnecessary after "despite".

Q9 Not checked
General Aptitude • INSTRUMENTATION ENGINEERING • Beginner • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Choose an option, which can be substituted for the given phrase:
Something that can not be imitated.

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
Inimitable means incapable of being duplicated. The word duplicity means dishonest behavior that is intended to trick someone. Something that is impossible to explain is called inexplicable and something that is impossible to avoid or prevent is termed as inevitable.

Q14 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

A electronic switch is required to be controlled during its turn on and turn off process. Which of the following can be the valid realization of switch?

Correct answer: D
Solution

(d)
Power MOSFET and GTO both can be controlled during turn on and turn off operation. DIAC and SCR are controlled only during turn on operation.
